entity.summary: Cross-chain decentralized exchange, bridge, and DeFi execution aggregator routing spot swaps and multi-step transactions across EVM networks, Solana, Bitcoin, and Sui through application, API, SDK, and intent-based products.
entity.notes: DZap Core, Fuse, and AI remain products of one routing and execution protocol identity rather than separate exchange entities. Current first-party documentation exposes live swap and bridge APIs, while current independent metrics report non-zero DEX and bridge aggregator volume. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: DZap official documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies DZap Core as a swap and bridge aggregator and documents public execution APIs, SDK support, smart contracts, intent settlement, and multi-chain routing.

evidence.title: DZap aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics classify DZap as a DEX aggregator and report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative DEX and bridge aggregator volume.
